summary: Video. DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas speaks direct-to-camera against a blue curtain, with a lower-third name plate and burned-in subtitles, describing DHS's anti-human-trafficking work for Human Trafficking Prevention Month. It is a static informational message driven entirely by speech, with no music track and no fast cutting.
notable_text: Lower third 'ALEJANDRO N. MAYORKAS, SECRETARY, DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'; end card 'TAKE ACTION - Visit dhs.gov/Blue-campaign'; DHS Blue Campaign
